news.t: Get Durability & Upside in Small-Cap Dividend Growth ETF SMDV
11 Best Dividend ETFs to Buy for a Diversified Portfolio

holdings.infoBox: SMDV is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Materion stock at 1.72%, Power Integrations at 1.65%, Insperity at 1.57%, Enpro at 1.39%, and The Gorman-Rupp Company at 1.34%.

overview.description: The ProShares Russell 2000 Dividend Growers ETF (SMDV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 Dividend Growth index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks with a 10-year record of increasing dividends. Stocks are equally weighted. SMDV was launched on Feb 5, 2015 and is issued by ProShares.
